message:
Fix TypeScript type errors in animation components

- Add `as const` assertions to CharacterReveal transition configs
- Import and use Variant type in ScrollReveal presetVariants
- Import and use MotionValue<number> type in PullToRefresh

These fixes resolve build failures caused by TypeScript's strict
type inference for Framer Motion transition types.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
